Leverage and Scale…
What is “leverage”?
• “Small hinges swing big doors”
• What small tweaks can you make that can create
a big impact without you putting in a lot of extra
time?
• Financial leverage
• Time leverage

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
What is “scale”?
• Where can your business grow?
• Fasttrack (mutual fund analysis software
subscription) would never scale
• PLF will scale
• …but not the way Google (or weight loss) scales
How leverage and scale are intertwined
• Many of the things that give you leverage, will
allow you to scale
• Many of the things that allow you to scale, will
also give you leverage
• They’re not the same, but they’re very intertwined
What do you want to scale? Or leverage?
• Plat Plus - the dollars don’t really scale, but the
impact on the business does
• Don’t focus on the dollars when looking at
scale/leverage
• Focus on your “unique ability”
• Focus on doing what you love and making your
life awesome
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
